title: PixelBlock Tamers : A Pokeblock Reborn
description: PixelBlock Tamers, A Lucky Block Mod compatible for both Cobblemon and Pixelmon, Test your luck now
body:
PixelBlock Tamers adds Lucky Blocks for both Cobblemon and Pixelmon.

PixelBlocks are an easy way to add the joy of luck and help beginners rise faster.
Not like Pokeblock this mod is more optimized for both gameplay and experience of the user

download to test your luck, to have fun, and boost your pixelmon or Cobblemon experience

Current Ver. 
Adds PixelBlocks
and Optimization better then previous works

More updates Coming Soon.
